spine_sentence: This unit argues that AI-assisted thesis revision needs visible edit boundaries because fluent local edits can hide claim and evidence-boundary drift.
scope_boundary: Motivate the writing-control problem only; do not introduce product architecture or universal model-safety claims.
core_claims: Thesis writers need visible edit boundaries when using AI across several turns; Source A and Source B support workflow-control need rather than universal model unreliability.
do_not_change: Do not claim all AI writing is unreliable; do not claim any specific model is unsafe for every writing task; do not move implementation architecture into this section.
